search_sale_placeholder: Search by sale number or customer
post_sale_return_description: This will write the accounting and stock entries. Posted documents cannot be edited or deleted.
reverse_sale_return_description: This creates a counter transaction and counter stock movement, then marks this sale return as reversed.
no_item_warning_description: Please select at least one item with a return quantity greater than zero
no_sale_selected: Select a posted sale to load its returnable items
